target_area.description: Table 6 official-scene load gate paragraph in Results

change_summary: Recast the Table 6 paragraph as a load gate for the same three official scenes.
Preserved the exact layout guard phrase '18 required paired runs' while replacing the page-break-prone original/noMDL/fresh-process wording with fresh launches and both asset families.
Kept the claim boundary explicit: load/run stability only, not speed, with the NVIDIA row omitted until matching scene conversions are generated and smoke-gated.

observations: Before: page 6 rendered 'same three offi-' followed by 'cial scenes'.
Before: page 6 rendered 'load-' followed by 'stability' in the claim-boundary sentence.
Before: page 6 rendered 'be-' followed by 'cause' and 'gen-' followed by 'erated' in the NVIDIA omission guardrail.
After: the target paragraph reads as a load gate, keeps '18 required paired runs', and removes the old official-scene/load-stability/generated split markers.
After: the PDF remains 11 pages, Figure 3 remains on page 6, and the neighboring page flow is stable.

Intermediate: wording that changed the phrase to '18 required paired fresh runs' failed tests/test_paper_layout.py::test_acl_results_avoids_page_break_prone_original_nomdl_phrase; the final wording restored the exact guard phrase.

verification.command: rg -n "Overfull|Float too large|too large|LaTeX Warning: Float|Rerun to get|Warning:.*Label|Undefined references|multiply defined|Package lineno Warning" paper/venues/acl27/build/main.log || true

verification.evidence: ok=true; no violations or unsafe figure violations.
1 passed in 0.08s after restoring the exact '18 required paired runs' phrase.
